name: Script Action Demo
author: PermsTest
description: Self-contained plugin with a controlled shell/script action routed through the selected PermsTest backend.
comments: Demonstrates script-capable plugins. Commands run through the host shell API and output is appended to PermsTest logs/output.

actions.title: Show Device Props
actions.description: Run a small shell command through the plugin host.
actions.command: printf 'model='; getprop ro.product.model; printf 'sdk='; getprop ro.build.version.sdk; printf 'abi='; getprop ro.product.cpu.abi
